description: Crisp white throat with very well defined borders, yellow lores, streaked mantle, gray washed breast and auriculars, white supercilium, bright rufous wings with white wing "bars".Behaviors: Eating seeds on ground underneath a pair of tube feeders. Was around for 15 minutes. Joined in with a flock of Juncos that had been at the feeders for over an hour before it arrived.Call: None observedPlumage: adult
